title: Author a <.input> custom wrapper with slot for field description
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/components/field.ex (module MyAppWeb.Field). Define field/1 as a Phoenix.Component with attrs :field (FormField, required), :label (string, required), :type (string, default "text"), :rest (:global). Declare slot :description. Render
<.input field={@field} type={@type} {@rest} />

{render_slot(@description)}

. The point is to wrap the core <.input> with an optional description slot.
tier_rationale: Component that composes another component + an optional slot. Multi-piece.
